sources.name: National Audit Office
sources.dataset: Language services in the justice system

metadata.methodology: Booking failures are instances where a requested interpreter was not provided at the time required. Delayed cases are hearings adjourned or delayed as a direct result of interpreter unavailability as a proportion of all hearings requiring an interpreter. Average cost per failed hearing includes court time costs, legal representation, and rescheduling overheads.
knownIssues: 2020 figures affected by COVID-19 court closures reducing absolute hearing volumes
Cost per failure is an estimate based on NAO methodology; actual costs vary significantly by case type
